name: OTR Capture State Machine Fixture Library - Batch 001
description: 100 bilingual fixtures for Capture local intent routing, state updates, and regression testing.
recommendedUse: Use these fixtures as local parser matching targets and regression tests.
Do not call LLM for fixtures that have action other than needs_llm.
If a fixture fails, Codex should update local resolver rules or state machine logic.
When real user testing finds a new failure, add it as a new fixture before fixing code.
